rulings.Case Title: **TRANSFERRED TO CONTRA COSTA COUNTY** GUARDIANSHIP OF HAYDEN ANGELO DE BARROS CHEN
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #3, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Hearing appearance required. Remote appearance by video or telephone should be made whenever possible. Please review the 9th amended general order for more information. To appear by Zoom, go to Zoom.com and click Join Meeting, and use the ID and password below. Meeting ID: 875 8017 7925 Password: 722809 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Parties appearing should check in for the hearing using their first and last name and case number. ISSUES (may be addressed at hearing): 1) On 04/08/2019 the court order page 2 line 6 states, "No other reimbursement for childcare are allowed without prior court approval. No court approval was sought for $5,385.00 in childcare expenses already reimbursed in this account. Examiner requested receipts for all entries. Only 2 copies of checks were provided that have no indicating what they were for. Please file receipts for all entries under Childcare showing dates of services and times. 2) On 04/08/2019 the court order page 2 line 9 states "Refund of $3,753.74 for life insurance premium paid shall be reflected in the next account." No such refund appears in the account. 3) Original statements not filed. [Prob. C. 2620(c).] 4) Has not filed mandatory judicial council form GC-400. 5) Please explain the legal basis for the guardianship paying legal expenses related to setting up the ward's inheritance estate. Please provide attorney timesheets for all legal expenses paid to ARCR. 6) Please provide legal authority for including the items listed on Schedule F Liabilities and file receipts for all entries. 7) Attorney fees do not appear to be mentioned in this account. The Court prefers to determine the amount of fees at the time an account is considered. [LRSF 14.56 B.] 8) Has not filed notice of hearing. Petitioner alleges co-guardian received notice.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF EDNA MARKETON
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 6/22/2021. ISSUES: 1) The account must be amended to begin with Decedent's date of death. [LRSF 14.35]. 2) Page 8 of the petition paragraph 28 must have the font size increased to 12 points. [CRC 2.104]. 3) Please explain and provide legal basis for Exhibit B entry 1/22/2019 General: prepare for phone conference. For $90.00 being included under costs. 4) On Exhibit B please explain and provide receipts for entry 11/18/2019 Copy Fees for $282.00. 5) On Exhibit B please explain and provide receipts for entry 08/31/2021 Copy Fees for $72.00. 6) On Exhibit B entry 7/8/2020 please explain why the entry is listed for $440.00 when the court fee is $435.00. 7) On Exhibit B please explain why the entry 12/29/2020 is listed for $445.00 when the court fee is $435.00. An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 6/7/2021 [LRSF 14.7 B.] Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing, notwithstanding the late filed amendment (no endorsed filed courtesy copy received by the Examiner yet, as of 5/24/21), which would have required notice, pursuant to CRC 7.53(a), the Court elects to deem the "amendment" as a second supplement to the petition. (The cash to be distributed is also all of the reported cash on hand, not reduced by fees or the reserve...) (Supplements or amendments should stand on their own and not refer to Examiner's Notes or issues raised by an Examiner, as Notes or issues are not filed for the record.)

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JOSE ANGEL MARQUEZ
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 7/6/21. (No earlier availability.) Issues necessitating continuance: No courtesy copies. No I&A. If courtesy copies of the I&A and petition and proof of service are not received by the assigned Examiner by 6/25/21, the hearing will be continued again. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B. NB: In order for this Court to track closed matters, orders to terminate a proceeding must begin with the following language: "Order for Final Distribution," or "Order Terminating Conservatorship [or Guardianship or Trust]." [LRSF 14.36 I.6.b.] Please make a note of it. (Except for exhibits, each paper filed with the court must bear a footer in the bottom margin of each page, placed below the page number and divided from the rest of the document page by a printed line. [CRC 2.110(a).])

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE RAMONA M. ALBRIGHT FAMILY TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Remove Trustee And Appoint Successor Trustee To Fill Vacancy
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues may include: 1) Petitioner alleges that Margaret Consoer and Keith Consoer indicated shortly after Decedent's death that they would be moving to Iowa. Petitioner has been unable to communicate at all with either of them and has no current contact information. Notices were sent to their last known address in San Francisco with the hopes that the notices would be forward to them in Iowa. 2) Petitioner requests appointment as successor trustee but the trust instrument nominates Margaret Consoer to serve, then Keith Consoer. No declinations have been filed. Petitioner avers that Decedent changed the trustee nomination to Gordon Yamamoto in his agreement with Settlor, which suggests that she no longer wanted either to serve. 3) Petitioner requests waiver of bond, but waivers of bond have not been filed. Remote appearances should be made whenever possible. Please review the 9th amended general order. The following information pertains to appearances by Zoom: WHEN ENTERING "YOUR NAME" ON ZOOM, BOTH THE FIRST AND LAST NAME, AS WELL THE CASE NUMBER, MUST BE INCLUDED. Meeting ID: 875 8017 7925 Password: 722809 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833, and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Information regarding appearance by CourtCall can be found in the 9th amended general order.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF TYLER CLIFFORD FEISEL
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 7/6/21. (No earlier availability.) Issues necessitating continuance: No proposed order. [LRSF 14.7 A.] The Confidential Statement of Birth Date and Driver's License Number (Judicial Council Form DE-147S) is also required, pursuant to Probate Code Section 8404(b). Form DE-147S must be filed separately and confidentially. A proposed non-resident personal representative must file a declaration setting forth in detail the anticipated liabilities of the decedent and claims against the estate for the Court to determine the amount of the bond. [LRSF 14.16 F.] (Why is a formal estate being opened for an estate estimated at only $1,000?) Courtesy copies and the proposed order must be received by the assigned Examiner by 6/25/21. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.
